title: cynanchica nitida subsp. hirtella
intro: Cynanchica nitida subsp. hirtella, also known as a species of the dogbane family, is a plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in the digestion process. Cynanchica nitida subsp. hirtella can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
